name: Miles
description: Self-hosted Miles AI agent powered by Arcee Trinity
short_desc: Self-hosted AI agent with tools and persistent memory
long_desc: Miles is the AI agent built into BizerOS — a self-hosted assistant for small, local businesses. Powered by Arcee Trinity via the OpenAI-compatible Arcee API. Provides 90+ tools, persistent memory, and an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint on port 8642 for integration with downstream apps. Forked from NousResearch/Hermes-Agent.
author: kelsi-bizer

form_fields.label: API Server Auth Key
form_fields.hint: Bearer token clients must pass to /v1/chat/completions. Generate any random string.
